briefing_zh:
今天 AI 领域最引人注目的动态来自开源模型阵营：**Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 以仅 3B 激活参数的 MoE 架构实现了与 35B 密集模型相当的 agentic coding 能力，在 Hacker News 上引爆了超过 1200 点的讨论。这标志着高效推理模型正在从理论走向实用，开源社区终于可以在消费级硬件上运行接近前沿水平的 agent 系统。

**Cloudflare** 同日发布了专为 AI agent 设计的推理基础设施层，包括 agent 级别的路由、持久化和工具调用支持，显示云厂商正在加速构建 agent-native 的基础设施。与此同时，**Dive into Claude Code** 这篇论文系统解析了当前最成功的 agentic coding 工具的架构设计空间，为构建下一代 agent 系统提供了宝贵的设计参考。

alphaxiv 上，**ClawBench** 揭示了一个残酷现实：即使是前沿模型在 144 个真实网站上的写操作任务中成功率仅为 0.7%–33.3%，而 **SkillClaw** 通过跨用户的集体技能进化将 agent 性能提升了 42.1%。在记忆系统方面，**SuperLocalMemory V3.3** 提出了受生物启发的遗忘和多通道检索机制，试图解决 agent "无法记住一小时前对话"的根本问题。GitHub 上，**anything-analyzer** 以 1275 星成为本周最热项目，将浏览器抓包、MITM 代理和 AI 分析整合为全能协议分析工具。
briefing_en:
Today's biggest story is **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B**, a MoE model with only 3B active parameters that matches 35B-dense model agentic coding capabilities, exploding on Hacker News with 1200+ points. This marks a turning point where efficient inference architectures are making frontier-level agent systems accessible on consumer hardware.

**Cloudflare** launched an inference infrastructure layer purpose-built for AI agents, with agent-level routing, persistence, and tool-calling support — signaling that cloud providers are racing to build agent-native infrastructure. Meanwhile, **Dive into Claude Code** provides a systematic architectural analysis of arguably the most successful agentic coding tool, mapping the design space for next-generation agent systems.

On alphaxiv, **ClawBench** reveals a harsh reality: frontier models achieve only 0.7%–33.3% success on write-heavy tasks across 144 live websites, while **SkillClaw** boosts agent performance by 42.1% through collective cross-user skill evolution. In memory systems, **SuperLocalMemory V3.3** proposes biologically-inspired forgetting and multi-channel retrieval for zero-LLM agent memory. On GitHub, **anything-analyzer** topped the week at 1275 stars, combining browser packet capture, MITM proxy, and AI analysis into an all-in-one protocol analysis tool.
viral_analysis_zh: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 毫无疑问是今天的爆款——3B 激活参数跑出 35B 效果的叙事太有冲击力，直接命中了开源社区"用更少算力做更多事"的核心痛点。标题中 "open to all" 的措辞精准触发了开源社群的传播欲望。**Cloudflare AI Platform** 则靠"为 agent 而生的基础设施"这一前瞻性定位获得 305 点关注，云厂商押注 agent 的信号让开发者感到兴奋。
viral_analysis_en: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** is today's clear viral winner — the "3B active params matching 35B dense" narrative is irresistibly compelling, hitting the open-source community's core desire to run powerful agents on modest hardware. The "open to all" framing in the title perfectly triggers sharing instincts. **Cloudflare's AI Platform** earned 305 points by positioning as agent-native infrastructure, signaling a major cloud provider's bet on the agent paradigm.

huggingface_papers.title: Dive into Claude Code: The Design Space of Today's and Future AI Agent Systems
huggingface_papers.tldr: Comprehensive architectural analysis of Claude Code as an agentic coding tool — examining its shell command execution, file editing, and external service calling capabilities. Maps out the design space for current and future AI agent systems, providing valuable blueprints for building production-grade coding agents.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 对 Claude Code 作为 agentic coding 工具的全面架构分析——研究其 shell 命令执行、文件编辑和外部服务调用能力。系统梳理了当前和未来 AI agent 系统的设计空间，为构建生产级编码 agent 提供了宝贵的设计蓝图。

huggingface_papers.title: DR^{3}-Eval: Towards Realistic and Reproducible Deep Research Evaluation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes a realistic and reproducible evaluation framework for Deep Research Agents (DRAs) that handle complex, long-horizon research tasks involving planning, retrieval, multimodal understanding, and report generation. Addresses the critical gap in how we evaluate agents that do end-to-end research.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出了一个针对深度研究 Agent（DRA）的现实且可复现的评估框架，涵盖规划、检索、多模态理解和报告生成等复杂长程研究任务。填补了端到端研究 agent 评估方法的关键空白。
huggingface_papers.authors: Qianqian Xie, Qingheng Xiong, He Zhu

huggingface_papers.title: SuperLocalMemory V3.3: The Living Brain -- Biologically-Inspired Forgetting, Cognitive Quantization, and Multi-Channel Retrieval for Zero-LLM Agent Memory Systems
huggingface_papers.tldr: Addresses the paradox that AI coding agents have vast knowledge but can't remember recent conversations. Proposes biologically-inspired forgetting, cognitive quantization, and multi-channel retrieval mechanisms for agent memory — without relying on LLM calls. A novel zero-LLM approach to persistent agent memory.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 解决了 AI 编码 agent 拥有大量知识却无法记住近期对话的悖论。提出受生物启发的遗忘机制、认知量化和多通道检索，构建不依赖 LLM 调用的 agent 记忆系统。这是一种新颖的零 LLM 持久化 agent 记忆方案。

huggingface_papers.title: MM-WebAgent: A Hierarchical Multimodal Web Agent for Webpage Generation
huggingface_papers.tldr: A hierarchical multimodal web agent that generates webpages by combining AIGC tools for images, videos, and visualizations. Uses a multi-level architecture to handle the complexity of modern webpage design, bridging the gap between content generation and web development.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 一个分层多模态网页 agent，结合 AIGC 工具生成图像、视频和可视化内容来构建网页。使用多层架构处理现代网页设计的复杂性，弥合了内容生成与网页开发之间的鸿沟。

huggingface_papers.title: How to Fine-Tune a Reasoning Model? A Teacher-Student Cooperation Framework to Synthesize Student-Consistent SFT Data
huggingface_papers.tldr: Tackles the challenge of fine-tuning reasoning models like Qwen3-8B with synthetic data. Shows that naive teacher-generated data hurts performance, and proposes a teacher-student cooperation framework that synthesizes student-consistent training data, achieving better results than standard SFT approaches.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 解决了使用合成数据微调推理模型（如 Qwen3-8B）的难题。发现简单使用教师模型生成的数据反而损害性能，提出了师生协作框架来合成与学生一致的训练数据，效果优于标准 SFT 方法。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zixian Huang, Kaichen Yang, Xu Huang

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillClaw: Autonomous LLM Agent Skill Evolution via Collective Cross-User Interactions
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Introduces a system where LLM agents autonomously evolve skills through collective interactions across users, achieving 42.1% average improvement in validation experiments. Paired with ClawBench (153 write-heavy tasks on 144 live websites), it reveals frontier models only achieve 0.7%–33.3% success rates.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出了一个 LLM agent 通过跨用户集体交互自主进化技能的系统，在验证实验中平均提升 42.1%。配套的 ClawBench 包含 144 个真实网站上的 153 个写操作任务，揭示前沿模型仅有 0.7%–33.3% 的成功率。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Neural Computers: Internalizing Computation, Memory, and I/O in Learned Runtime State
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Meta AI and KAUST propose a new paradigm that internalizes computation, memory, and I/O into learned runtime state. The model can generate terminal screens and GUI control from I/O traces, representing a fundamental shift from tool-using to tool-becoming for neural networks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Meta AI 和 KAUST 提出将计算、内存和 I/O 内化到学习的运行时状态中的新范式。模型能从 I/O 轨迹生成终端屏幕和 GUI 控制，代表了从"使用工具"到"成为工具"的根本性转变。

alphaxiv_papers.title: PaperOrchestra: Multi-Agent AI Research Paper Writing
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google's multi-agent system for automated research paper writing achieves 84% simulated acceptance rate at CVPR and 81% at ICLR. Demonstrates that orchestrated agent teams can produce publication-quality scientific writing, raising important questions about the future of academic research.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google 的多 agent 自动化论文写作系统在 CVPR 模拟评审中达到 84% 接收率，ICLR 达到 81%。证明了协调的 agent 团队可以产出达到发表水平的科学写作，引发了对学术研究未来的重要讨论。

alphaxiv_papers.title: DMax: Parallel Decoding for Diffusion LLMs with 6.2 Tokens Per Forward Pass
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Achieves an average of 6.2 tokens per forward pass for diffusion-based LLMs through On-Policy Uniform Training and Soft Parallel Decoding, with minimal accuracy loss. A significant step toward making diffusion LLMs practical for real-time applications.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 通过策略内均匀训练和软并行解码，实现了扩散 LLM 每次前向传播平均生成 6.2 个 token，精度损失极小。这是让扩散 LLM 走向实时应用的重要一步。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Externalization Framework: Unifying LLM Agent Reliability via Persistent External Structures
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Proposes a unifying principle for improving LLM agent reliability by relocating cognitive burdens to persistent external structures — memory, skills, and protocols. Provides a theoretical framework explaining why techniques like RAG, tool use, and skill libraries work.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出了通过将认知负担转移到持久化外部结构（记忆、技能、协议）来统一提升 LLM agent 可靠性的原理。提供了一个理论框架，解释了 RAG、工具使用和技能库等技术为何有效。

github_repos.name: Mouseww/anything-analyzer
github_repos.tldr: All-in-one protocol analysis tool combining browser packet capture, MITM proxy, fingerprint spoofing, AI analysis, and MCP Server integration for seamless AI Agent/IDE connectivity. A Swiss Army knife for reverse-engineering and analyzing network protocols.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 全能协议分析工具：集成浏览器抓包、MITM 代理、指纹伪装、AI 分析和 MCP Server，可无缝对接 AI Agent/IDE。网络协议逆向分析的瑞士军刀。

github_repos.name: h4ckf0r0day/obscura
github_repos.tldr: A headless browser built specifically for AI agents and web scraping, written in Rust. Designed for high-performance, stealthy web automation — the kind of infrastructure that CUA/GUI agents need to interact with the real web.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 专为 AI agent 和网页抓取打造的无头浏览器，Rust 编写。面向高性能隐蔽网页自动化——正是 CUA/GUI agent 与真实网页交互所需的基础设施。

github_repos.name: poseljacob/agentic-video-editor
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered video editor that takes raw footage and a creative brief, then autonomously produces polished video. Demonstrates agentic workflows applied to creative media production, turning what was hours of manual work into an automated pipeline.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的视频编辑器，输入原始素材和创意简报即可自主输出精剪视频。将 agentic 工作流应用于创意媒体制作，把数小时的手工操作变成自动化流水线。

github_repos.name: arlington-labs/agentchat
github_repos.tldr: Private group chats between friends' AI agents via S2 streams. Each user's agent can communicate and collaborate with others' agents in real-time, creating a social network of AI agents that interact on behalf of their owners.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 通过 S2 流实现朋友间 AI agent 的私密群聊。每个用户的 agent 可以与他人的 agent 实时通信协作，构建了一个 AI agent 代替主人社交的网络。

github_repos.name: fluentlc/claude-code-java
github_repos.tldr: An embeddable AI Agent engine for Java applications, inspired by Claude Code. Brings agentic coding capabilities into the Java ecosystem, allowing any Java app to integrate autonomous code generation and tool-calling agents.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 可嵌入任何 Java 应用的 AI Agent 引擎，灵感来自 Claude Code。将 agentic coding 能力引入 Java 生态，让任何 Java 应用都能集成自主代码生成和工具调用 agent。

hackernews.title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
hackernews.tldr: Qwen releases a MoE model with 35B total but only 3B active parameters that matches dense 35B models in agentic coding tasks. This dramatic efficiency gain means frontier-level coding agents can now run on consumer GPUs, democratizing access to powerful AI coding assistants.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Qwen 发布了总参数 35B 但仅 3B 激活参数的 MoE 模型，在 agentic coding 任务上匹敌密集 35B 模型。这意味着前沿级编码 agent 现在可以在消费级 GPU 上运行，真正实现了强大 AI 编码助手的平民化。

hackernews.title: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
hackernews.tldr: Cloudflare launches an inference infrastructure layer purpose-built for AI agents, with agent-level routing, state persistence, and native tool-calling support. Signals that major cloud providers are building the plumbing specifically for the agent era.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Cloudflare 发布专为 AI agent 设计的推理基础设施层，支持 agent 级路由、状态持久化和原生工具调用。标志着主要云厂商正在为 agent 时代专门铺设基础设施。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Libretto – Making AI browser automations deterministic
hackernews.tldr: Open-source tool that makes AI-driven browser automations deterministic and reproducible. Solves the key reliability problem in browser agents — when the same instruction should produce the same result every time. Critical infrastructure for production CUA systems.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 开源工具让 AI 驱动的浏览器自动化变得确定性和可复现。解决了浏览器 agent 的关键可靠性问题——相同指令应每次产生相同结果。对生产级 CUA 系统至关重要的基础设施。

hackernews.title: Show HN: A memory database that forgets, consolidates, and detects contradiction
hackernews.tldr: A purpose-built database for AI agent memory that implements forgetting, consolidation, and contradiction detection — mimicking how human memory actually works. Goes beyond simple vector stores to handle the messy reality of long-running agent conversations.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 专为 AI agent 记忆打造的数据库，实现了遗忘、巩固和矛盾检测——模拟人类记忆的实际工作方式。超越了简单的向量存储，处理长时间 agent 对话的复杂现实。

hackernews.title: Scan your website to see how ready it is for AI agents
hackernews.tldr: A diagnostic tool that scans websites to evaluate their readiness for AI agent interaction. Checks for structured data, API availability, and machine-readable interfaces — reflecting the growing expectation that websites need to be agent-friendly.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一个诊断工具，扫描网站评估其对 AI agent 交互的就绪程度。检查结构化数据、API 可用性和机器可读接口——反映出网站需要对 agent 友好的日益增长的预期。
